title: AxMinions
description: The Ultimate Minions plugin with great customization and performance!
body:

</center>
<details>
<summary>Text Transcript</summary>
AxMinions
The All-In-One Minion Plugin

What is AxMinions?
AxMinions is the most performant minion / robot plugin on the market. You can give tools to minions, create levels, customize everything!
There are currently 7 builtin minions, that can help the player farm crops, mine generators, catch fish, kill mobs, collect items, cut trees, sell items.

Features

Own Tools!
You can give your own tools to minions and they will be able use them, most vanilla minecraft enchantments are also supported!

Durability (toggleable)
Minions seem too overpowered? Enable the durability setting, to make their tools lose durability!

Customize Minions!
You can customize the armor/appearance of the minions!

Upgrade Minions
You can upgrade your minions, and they will become faster, get more range! You also can create as many levels as you want, and customize everything.

Customizable minion GUI
Customize the GUI to your liking, you can edit basically everything.

Limitations
You can create per player/group minion limits with permissions.

Great Performance
The plugin is very optimized, so you don't need to worry about that!

Developer API
Are you a developer? You can easily create your unique minions if you want!

Loaded Chunk = Working Minions
If the chunk is loaded the minions will work for you, even if you're AFK or using a chunk-loader!
</details>

![https://i.imgur.com/8JEXtWo.png](https://i.imgur.com/8JEXtWo.png)
**- /axminions give <player> <type> (level) (amount)** - Give a player a minion // Permission: axminions.command.give
**- /minions reload** - Reload the configurations // Permission: axminions.command.reload
**- /minions statistics** - Show statistics about the placed minions // Permission: axminions.command.statistics
**- /minions convert** - Convert from a different minion plugin // Permission: axminions.command.convert

**If you need Commissions, Support, or anything else**
